description: JavaScript interaction patterns for fundamental-styles components

table-sorting.name: Sortable Table
table-sorting.description: Enable column sorting with visual indicators
table-sorting.html: Name

accessibility.keyboardSupport: Enter/Space to sort, Tab to navigate

table-selection.name: Row Selection
table-selection.description: Enable single or multi-row selection with checkboxes
table-selection.html: Selected Row

dialog-open-close.name: Dialog Open/Close
dialog-open-close.description: Show and hide modal dialogs with proper focus management

accessibility.keyboardSupport: Escape to close, Tab/Shift+Tab for focus trap
accessibility.focusManagement: Move focus to dialog on open, restore focus on close, trap focus within dialog

side-nav-collapse.name: Collapsible Side Navigation
side-nav-collapse.description: Expand and collapse side navigation menu

input-validation.name: Input Validation
input-validation.description: Real-time form input validation with error messages
input-validation.html: Please enter a valid email address

accessibility.liveRegions: Use aria-live="polite" on error container for screen readers
accessibility.errorAssociation: Link input to error message with aria-describedby

popover-toggle.name: Popover Show/Hide
popover-toggle.description: Toggle popover visibility on button click
popover-toggle.html: Popover content

tabs-switching.name: Tab Switching
tabs-switching.description: Switch between tab panels with keyboard navigation
tabs-switching.html:
• Tab 1
  • Tab 2
Panel 1 content
Panel 2 content

accessibility.keyboardSupport: Arrow keys to navigate, Home/End to jump, Tab to enter panel
accessibility.focusManagement: Only active tab is in tab order (tabindex=0), others have tabindex=-1

commonPitfalls.issue: Not managing focus properly in dialogs
commonPitfalls.solution: Always move focus to dialog on open and restore it on close. Trap focus within the dialog.
Set aria-hidden="true" on elements that are visually hidden but still in DOM

commonPitfalls.issue: Not updating ARIA attributes when state changes
commonPitfalls.solution: Update aria-selected, aria-expanded, aria-invalid, etc. whenever visual state changes

commonPitfalls.issue: Missing keyboard support for interactive elements
commonPitfalls.solution: Always add keyboard handlers (Enter, Space, Escape, Arrow keys) for custom interactive elements
